question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: i want to now how i can do the marking easier, it took sl long

assessment.note: Pivoted from self-assessment to a specific friction point — marking feels inefficient and time-heavy, signaling low clarity on how to do the work effectively and mild strain on engagement.

new_queue.label: Marking friction
new_queue.name: Marking took so long — what specifically made it slow?

new_queue.label: Class impact evidence
new_queue.name: What changed for learners because of your work on the new university class?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Hidden friction
new_queue.name: Where is the coaching work still taking more effort than it should?

new_queue.label: Input quality
new_queue.name: What feedback are you not getting enough of right now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would make the new university class easier to sustain week to week?

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: i want to now how i can do the marking easier, it took sl long
i want to now how i can do the marking easier, it took sl long
